meta.title: Open AI School — Free AI Education for Everyone
meta.description: Learn Artificial Intelligence from scratch, in your language. No coding experience needed.

hero.badge: 100% Free • Open Source • In Your Language
hero.title: Learn AI from Zero.
hero.subtitle: Understand Artificial Intelligence through simple lessons, fun examples, and hands-on experiments — right in your browser. Available in 5 languages.

features.title: Designed for Absolute Beginners
features.subtitle: You don't need to know programming, maths, or anything technical. We start from the very basics.

beginner.title: Start from Zero
beginner.description: Never touched code? Perfect. Our lessons use everyday language and real-world examples you already understand — like how Netflix recommends movies or how your phone recognises your face.

interactive.title: Learn by Doing
interactive.description: Every lesson has hands-on experiments you can try right in your browser. Train an AI to recognise drawings, teach a chatbot to respond, and see results instantly.

multilingual.title: In Your Language
multilingual.description: AI education shouldn't only be available in English. Learn in Hindi, Telugu, French, Dutch, or English — whichever feels like home.

free.title: Free Forever
free.description: No subscriptions, no paywalls, no 'premium tier'. This is open-source education — built by the community, for the community.

community.title: Learn Together
community.description: Join a community of curious learners from India, Europe, Africa, and beyond. Ask questions, share your experiments, and help translate lessons.

practical.title: Real-World AI
practical.description: Understand how AI works in things you use every day — search engines, voice assistants, social media feeds, self-driving cars, and medical diagnosis.

journey.title: Your Learning Journey
journey.subtitle: A clear path from curious beginner to AI-literate citizen

step1.title: What is AI?
step1.description: Start with the basics — what AI actually is, how it's different from regular software, and why everyone's talking about it.

step2.title: How Machines Learn
step2.description: Discover how computers learn from examples, just like you learned to recognise cats and dogs as a child.

step3.title: Build Your First AI
step3.description: Train a simple AI model in your browser — no installation needed. See it learn and improve right before your eyes.

step4.title: AI in the Real World
step4.description: Explore how AI powers the apps and services you use daily — and think critically about its impact on society.

founder.description: Software engineer and technical lead with 14+ years of experience building large-scale systems across India, the United Kingdom, Belgium, and Europe. Having led digital transformations across retail, loyalty, and financial services, I founded Open AI School to make world-class AI and engineering education freely accessible — in every language, for every background.
founder.role: Founder · Technical Lead · Open Source Advocate

cta.title: Ready to Start?
cta.subtitle: Your first lesson takes just 10 minutes. No signup required.

footer.tagline: Free AI education for everyone, in every language.
footer.madeWith: Made with ❤️ from London, for the world

about.title: About Open AI School
about.missionText: To make AI education accessible to every student in the world — regardless of their language, background, or whether they've ever written a line of code.
about.storyText1: I'm Ramesh Reddy Adutla — a software engineer with 14 years of experience. I've built systems at JP Morgan, Sky, and Marks & Spencer. I've lived and worked in India, Belgium (6 years), and now London.
about.storyText2: In my career, I've seen how transformative AI is becoming. But I've also seen that AI education is concentrated in expensive universities in wealthy countries. Students in India, Africa, and many parts of Europe don't have the same access.
about.storyText3: When I told a senior colleague that many students in India are being left behind in the AI revolution, it struck a nerve. That conversation planted a seed — and Open AI School was born to change that.
about.storyText4: I speak English, French, and Telugu. I've lived the multicultural experience. I believe the best person to bridge this gap is someone who's been on both sides of it.

value1.title: Accessible
value1.description: If you can open a web browser, you can learn AI. No special software, no powerful computer needed.

value2.title: Inclusive
value2.description: Education in your language, with examples from your culture. AI isn't just a Silicon Valley thing.

value3.title: Honest
value3.description: We teach what AI can do AND what it can't. No hype, no fear — just understanding.

value4.title: Open
value4.description: Every lesson, every line of code is open source. Fork it, translate it, improve it.

about.subtitle: Software Engineer • Educator • Open Source Contributor

lessons.title: Lessons
lessons.subtitle: Start from the very beginning. Each lesson builds on the last — no rushing, no assumptions.

playground.title: AI Playground
playground.subtitle: Experiment with real AI models right in your browser. No installation, no coding — just play!

imageClassifier.title: 🎨 Drawing Recogniser
imageClassifier.description: Draw something and watch AI guess what it is! This shows how AI learns to recognise patterns — the same technology that lets your phone identify objects in photos.
imageClassifier.explanation: This AI was trained on thousands of drawings by people like you. It learned patterns — like circles for faces, four legs for dogs. When you draw, it compares your drawing to patterns it's seen before and makes its best guess.

sentiment.title: 💭 Mood Detector
sentiment.description: Type a sentence and AI will detect the mood — happy, sad, angry, or neutral. This is the same technology behind social media monitoring and customer feedback analysis.
sentiment.comingSoon: Coming soon — help us build it!

programs.subtitle: From absolute beginner to AI expert — pick the level that matches where you are right now.
programs.trackAIDesc: Grow from zero to AI expert — nature-inspired progression
programs.trackCraftDesc: Ace your dream interview — workshop-inspired mastery
programs.trackCraftBrand: Learn the algorithms that power AI, design the systems that scale AI, and ace the interviews that land you AI-era jobs.
